name: insurance brokers processing 5–15 submissions/month tool
description: For insurance brokers processing 5–15 submissions/month, inefficient data handling causes delays in underwriting approvals. We automate the conversion of policy data instead of manual data entry and submission processes.
problem_solved: Inefficient conversion of insurance policy data into underwriting submissions.
